---
name: Bug report
about: Audit produced wrong or missing data for a real URL
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Sub-skill**
Which command triggered the issue? e.g. `/seo audit`, `/seo brand`

**URL audited**
The URL you ran the audit on (can be anonymized if needed).

**Expected output**
What should the skill have reported?

**Actual output**
What did it actually report? Paste the relevant section.

**Fetch that failed**
Did a specific data fetch fail? (PageSpeed API, robots.txt, llms.txt, etc.)

**Additional context**
Any other context — CSR site, paywalled content, unusual server config, etc.
